reviews.comment:
siempre lentos los chicos de los surtidores para cargar nafta,es un problema de hace años porque no hay personal parece. es una parada casi obligatoria de un buen rato,los precios del full son buenos igual que la comida, tiene mesas afuera para comer mientras ves el río que pasa.

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the gas pumps are always slow; it's been a problem for years because there don't seem to be enough staff. It's almost a mandatory stop for a while, though. The prices for a full tank are good, as is the food, and there are tables outside where you can eat while watching the river flow by.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su opinión
